articles.title: Over 17,000 factories registered in nine years of Yogi rule, shows data
articles.description: “Over the past nine years, the Yogi Government has established a new identity for Uttar Pradesh in the field of industrial development. dailyNews.description: President Trump has long wanted to place additional restrictions on mail-in voting, which he has called "mail-in cheating."

dailyNews.title: Iran strikes Kuwait oil tanker off Dubai, state media says
dailyNews.description: A Kuwait oil tanker was Iran's latest target in the fight over the Strait of Hormuz, state media reported Tuesday. President Trump has threatened to strike Iran's energy plants if the strait is not reopened. CBS News White House reporter Aaron Navarro has more.

dailyNews.title: As Americans bear costs of Iran war and DHS shutdown, D.C. politicians leave town

dailyNews.description: The order, which is expected to be quickly challenged in court, is the president's second effort to use executive authority to shape the country's election rules.

dailyNews.title: Federal judge temporarily blocks construction of Trump's White House ballroom
